history: BurntHare started in 2016 with a single race around Hitchin town centre and a few dozen runners. Ten years on, we run four events a year across running, triathlon and multisport, with thousands of entrants and a small army of volunteers who make it all possible.
We're run by local people, for local people — every event is designed to showcase Hitchin and the surrounding Hertfordshire countryside, while raising money for local good causes along the way.

testimonials.quote: Best organised local 10k I've ever run. Marshals everywhere, great atmosphere, and the medal is gorgeous.
testimonials.name: Sarah K.

testimonials.quote: My first ever triathlon and the BurntHare team made it so welcoming. Already signed up for next year.
testimonials.name: Tom R.

testimonials.quote: The kids absolutely loved the Golden Mile — brilliant family morning out.
testimonials.name: The Patel family
